title: Dust Be My Destiny
writer: Robert Rossen, Jerome Odlum, Seton I. Miller
actors: John Garfield, Priscilla Lane, Alan Hale
plot: Joe Bell, wrongly imprisoned for burglary, gets released to a prison farm. His romance with the foreman's daughter leads to the foreman's accidental death. Fearing disbelief, Bell flees with the daughter, Mabel.
